collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Bethel Pew
collectibles.flavor: Tucked under a pew at Seamen's Bethel, scratched with a whaling ship's initials.

collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Fish Pier Piling
collectibles.flavor: Wedged in a piling at the fish pier, worn smooth by fifty years of tide.

collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Anvil Garage Shelf
collectibles.flavor: Sal keeps it on a shelf behind the parts counter and swears it's cursed.

collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Quohog Republic Back Booth
collectibles.flavor: Somebody carved a whale onto it, then carved a name off it in a hurry.

collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Off the Hook Bar Rafters
collectibles.flavor: Stashed in the rafters at Off the Hook, wrapped in a page of an old ledger.

collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Battleship Cove Overlook
collectibles.flavor: Left on a rail overlooking the USS Massachusetts, facing out toward Mount Hope Bay.

collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Champion City Gym Trophy Case
collectibles.flavor: Iron Mike keeps it next to a photo of a fighter nobody remembers anymore.

collectibles.name: Scrimshaw Tooth - Heritage Marina Slip
collectibles.flavor: Found in a boat slip at the heritage marina, next to hull numbers that don't match the registry.
